summary: Frontend-only testing of TRUSTED SERVICE KING landing page on mobile viewport. All 11 requested feature areas verified successfully: brand badge + 24x7 hero, 10 WhatsApp CTAs (>=8) each with correct href=https://wa.link/16268y7 + target=_blank + rel=noopener, FAB visible bottom-right, sticky CTA persistent on scroll, all 6 services present, all required sections visible, FAQ expands on click, no parcel/courier/logistics content. Page is effectively mobile-friendly (body overflow-x: hidden prevents horizontal scrolling).

issues: document.documentElement.scrollWidth (460) > clientWidth (360) due to decorative .bg-glow-2 element using right:-100px and .bg-glow-3 using left:-100px (320-360px blurred circles). body has overflow-x:hidden so user cannot actually scroll horizontally (window.scrollX stays 0). Pure cosmetic — consider adding overflow-x:hidden on html or on .App container as well to make scrollWidth match clientWidth and avoid future test false positives.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add overflow-x: hidden to html or .App container in App.css to silence the documentElement scrollWidth > clientWidth false positive caused by decorative bg-glow elements positioned off-screen (right:-100px, left:-100px). Visually correct already because body has overflow-x:hidden.
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsAppButton component cleanly factored with WA_LINK constant — single source of truth for the wa.link URL (good).
All 10 anchors correctly use target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer' — secure tab opening.
No backend dependencies — pure static React landing page, REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL not referenced by LandingPage (acceptable for this static landing).
IntersectionObserver-based reveal animation correctly unobserves after firing; cleanup via io.disconnect() on unmount.
Decorative .bg-glow elements positioned with negative offsets cause documentElement scrollWidth to exceed clientWidth, masked by body overflow-x:hidden — works but is a code smell.
FAQ uses native <details>/<summary> — accessible and keyboard-friendly by default.
data-testid coverage is excellent across all interactive elements and sections.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (16/16 functional tests passed; 1 cosmetic-only DOM measurement caveat)

seed_data_creation: None — static landing page with no backend or DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 WhatsApp anchors (hero-contact-whatsapp, cta-whatsapp-1, cta-whatsapp-2, cta-whatsapp-services, cta-whatsapp-why, cta-whatsapp-steps, cta-whatsapp-guarantee, cta-whatsapp-final, sticky-whatsapp, fab-whatsapp) are present and configured correctly. Use document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => el.classList.add('in')) to force-show all reveal-animated content for headless tests. Use document.body.scrollWidth > document.body.clientWidth (NOT documentElement) to validate horizontal overflow because body has overflow-x:hidden but decorative bg-glow elements extend html scrollWidth.
